General.question: What is LoopBridge?
General.answer: LoopBridge is a Web3 education, community, and exchange ecosystem. We combine structured learning through LoopBridge Academy, peer-to-peer trading through our WhatsApp Exchange, and a growing community of learners and traders — all under one bridge.

General.question: What does 'New Finance' or 'PostModern Finance' mean?
General.answer: PostModern Finance is a term coined by the founder of LoopBridge to describe the evolving world of decentralized finance, digital assets, and blockchain-based economies. It represents a shift from traditional financial systems to open, participatory, and community-driven models.

General.question: Who can use LoopBridge?
General.answer: Anyone who is curious about cryptocurrency, blockchain, or Web3 can use LoopBridge. Whether you're a complete beginner or an experienced trader, our Academy, Exchange, and Community are designed to meet you where you are.

General.question: Is LoopBridge available globally?
General.answer: Yes! LoopBridge is available to users worldwide. While we started in Nigeria and have a strong presence in the African crypto community, our tools and resources are accessible to anyone with an internet connection.

Trading.question: How does the WhatsApp Exchange work?
Trading.answer: Our WhatsApp Exchange allows you to trade crypto directly through WhatsApp. Simply start a chat, confirm live rates, send your payment, and receive your crypto — all with human support.

Trading.question: What currencies can I trade?
Trading.answer: Currently, we support trading between Nigerian Naira (NGN) and popular cryptocurrencies including Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), USDT, and several other tokens. We're expanding our supported currencies regularly.

Academy.question: Are the courses free?
Academy.answer: Many of our beginner-level courses are completely free. Some intermediate and advanced courses may have a fee, which helps us sustain the platform and create higher-quality content.

Academy.question: Do I get a certificate after completing a course?
Academy.answer: We're working on a certificate and badge system that will be available soon. For now, completing courses helps you build real skills and knowledge that you can apply immediately.

Community.question: How do I join the community?
Community.answer: You can join our community on WhatsApp, Discord, Telegram, YouTube, or X (Twitter). Each platform offers a different experience — from real-time trading discussions to structured learning groups.

Security & Trust.question: Is my money safe with LoopBridge?
Security & Trust.answer: We use secure processes and work with verified trading partners. However, crypto assets are inherently volatile and we encourage all users to do their own research (DYOR) and never invest more than they can afford to lose.

Support & Contact.question: How do I contact support?
Support & Contact.answer: You can reach us at support@loopbridge.network for technical issues, hello@loopbridge.network for general enquiries, or press@loopbridge.network for media requests.

Risk & Responsibility.question: What are the risks of trading crypto?
Risk & Responsibility.answer: Cryptocurrency trading carries significant risk. Prices can be extremely volatile, and you could lose some or all of your investment. LoopBridge provides education and tools, but financial decisions are your responsibility. Always do your own research and only invest what you can afford to lose.
